subject: ARALING_PANLIPUNAN
title: Cultural Practices in Daily Life
objective: Ihambing ang gawi nang may paggalang at walang pagraranggo.
introduction: Ilarawan kung ano ang napansin, tukuyin ang source, at iwasang gawing pangkalahatan sa lahat. You will explore examples, sort cards, practice, and answer five questions.

vocabulary.definition: A key word used in the lesson “Cultural Practices in Daily Life”.
A key word used in the lesson “Cultural Practices in Daily Life”.
A key word used in the lesson “Cultural Practices in Daily Life”.

activities.instruction: Pag-aralan ang ideya at pakinggan ang salaysay.
activities.content: Ilarawan kung ano ang napansin, tukuyin ang source, at iwasang gawing pangkalahatan sa lahat.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: Text alternative: Ilarawan kung ano ang napansin, tukuyin ang source, at iwasang gawing pangkalahatan sa lahat.

activities.instruction: Suriin ang bawat learning token at basahin ang mga halimbawa.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: A numbered list of the same examples is available for keyboard and screen-reader use.

activities.instruction: Ilagay ang bawat card sa “angkop” o “hindi angkop.”

doesNotFit: Magsalita para sa grupong di kinonsulta

feedback.correct: Your groups follow the lesson rule.
feedback.retry: Use the explanation, not color or position.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Tap an item and then tap a labeled category; dragging is optional.

options: May iba’t ibang paraan ng pagbati.

feedback.correct: Correct: May iba’t ibang paraan ng pagbati.
feedback.retry: Read the lesson rule again. Mali ang kanilang paraan. and Lahat sila ay pareho. do not fit.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: All choices are visible text and selectable with TalkBack.

activities.instruction: Itambal ang bawat halimbawa sa ideya ng aralin.

feedback.retry: Return to the explanation and compare one pair at a time.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: A list-based matching control replaces drag gestures.

activities.instruction: Tapusin nang sunod-sunod ang gabay na balik-aral.

feedback.correct: You are ready for the five-question check.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Up and down buttons provide an alternative to dragging.

items.prompt: Aling pahayag ang pinakaangkop sa “Cultural Practices in Daily Life”?

options.text: Ilarawan kung ano ang napansin, tukuyin ang source, at iwasang gawing pangkalahatan sa lahat.

items.explanation: The correct response is “Ilarawan kung ano ang napansin, tukuyin ang source, at iwasang gawing pangkalahatan sa lahat.” because it follows the lesson explanation: Ilarawan kung ano ang napansin, tukuyin ang source, at iwasang gawing pangkalahatan sa lahat.
The correct response is “iba’t ibang pagbati” because it follows the lesson explanation: Ilarawan kung ano ang napansin, tukuyin ang source, at iwasang gawing pangkalahatan sa lahat.

items.prompt: Alin ang hindi sumusunod sa ideya ng aralin?
items.explanation: The correct response is “Tawaging kakaiba bilang insulto” because it follows the lesson explanation: Ilarawan kung ano ang napansin, tukuyin ang source, at iwasang gawing pangkalahatan sa lahat.

options.text: May iba’t ibang paraan ng pagbati.

items.explanation: The correct response is “May iba’t ibang paraan ng pagbati.” because it follows the lesson explanation: Ilarawan kung ano ang napansin, tukuyin ang source, at iwasang gawing pangkalahatan sa lahat.

items.prompt: Aling halimbawa ang dapat gamitin sa huling balik-aral?

options.text: Magsalita para sa grupong di kinonsulta

items.explanation: The correct response is “iba’t ibang wika” because it follows the lesson explanation: Ilarawan kung ano ang napansin, tukuyin ang source, at iwasang gawing pangkalahatan sa lahat.

assetSpecs.prompt: Friendly Grade 3 cartoon storybook concept board for Cultural Practices in Daily Life; rounded shapes, warm dark-brown outlines, tropical palette, no embedded text, uncluttered small-screen layout. Compose overlays provide labels and interactive targets.
assetSpecs.contentDescription: Five connected learning tokens for exploring examples in Cultural Practices in Daily Life.
